def toBoundedBilin {C : ℝ} (f : (spectrum ℂ a) → ℂ)
  : H →L⋆[ℂ] H →L[ℂ] ℂ where
  toFun x := {  
    toFun y := (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f
    map_add' := by
      intro y₁ y₂
      have h₁ : (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x (y₁ + y₂)).integral f = (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y₁).integral f + (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y₂).integral f := by
        sorry
      simp_all [ComplexAdditive.add_apply]
      <;> ring_nf at *
      <;> simp_all [ComplexAdditive.add_apply]
      <;> linarith
    map_smul' := by
      intro c y
      have h₂ : (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x (c • y)).integral f = c • ((cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f) := by
        sorry
      simp_all [ComplexAdditive.smul_apply]
      <;> ring_nf at *
      <;> simp_all [ComplexAdditive.smul_apply]
      <;> linarith
    cont := by
      sorry
  }
  map_add' := by
    intro x₁ x₂
    ext y
    have h₃ : (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha (x₁ + x₂) y).integral f = (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x₁ y).integral f + (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x₂ y).integral f := by
      sorry
    simp_all [ComplexAdditive.add_apply]
    <;> ring_nf at *
    <;> simp_all [ComplexAdditive.add_apply]
    <;> linarith
  map_smul' := by sorry
  cont := by sorry

def toBoundedBilin {C : ℝ} (f : (spectrum ℂ a) → ℂ)

  toFun x := {  
    toFun y := (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f
    map_add' := by
      intro y₁ y₂
      have h₁ : (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x (y₁ + y₂)).integral f = (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y₁).integral f + (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y₂).integral f := by
        sorry
      simp_all [ComplexAdditive.add_apply]
      <;> ring_nf at *

      <;> linarith
    map_smul' := by
      intro c y
      have h₂ : (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x (c • y)).integral f = c • ((cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f) := by
        sorry
      simp_all [ComplexAdditive.smul_apply]
      <;> ring_nf at *
      <;> simp_all [ComplexAdditive.smul_apply]
      <;> linarith
    cont := by
      sorry

    simp_all [ComplexAdditive.add_apply]
    <;> ring_nf at *
    <;> simp_all [ComplexAdditive.add_apply]
    <;> linarith
